items.title: Hugo Gonzalez was talking to himself after that turnover. I caught the tail end of it.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Hugo Gonzalez was talking to himself after that turnover. I caught the tail end of it.

Multiple times, he uttered to himself, “Come on, man.”

items.title: It didn't lead to a basket, but that was a good look from Amari Williams to a cutting Hugo Gonzalez.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
It didn't lead to a basket, but that was a good look from Amari Williams to a cutting Hugo Gonzalez.

Another example of Williams's passing and the Celtics playing through him early.

items.title: Hugo Gonzalez is out here rebounding for the Sin City Celtics ahead of their game against the Hawks.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Hugo Gonzalez is out here rebounding for the Sin City Celtics ahead of their game against the Hawks.

It appears like his second Summer League stint is done.

items.title: NEW FEATURE: Joe Mazzulla cheered on Hugo Gonzalez in Spain.
items.author: Noa Dalzell
items.body_excerpt:
NEW FEATURE: Joe Mazzulla cheered on Hugo Gonzalez in Spain. 

He grabbed BBQ with Jordan Walsh in Texas & met Neemias Queta’s childhood friends in Portugal.

"That's why I'm running through a wall for him.”

Part II of my exclusive conversation with Joe: 
www.celticsblog.com/boston-celti...

media.title: Inside Joe Mazzulla’s unorthodox offseason: an exclusive conversation with the Celtics head coach
media.description: Mazzulla travelled from Portugal to Spain to Nebraska to Texas in hopes of deepening his relationship with each of his players. I sat down with him to discuss why.

"Jaylen’s a guy that you can’t replace in the city. Really, really hard to replace on the court as well. He did so much for Boston in general."

items.title: Hugo Gonzalez is included on the Summer Celtics roster. Unclear how much Gonzalez will play after just playing in FIBA World Cup Qualifiers for Spain this week.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Hugo Gonzalez is included on the Summer Celtics roster. Unclear how much Gonzalez will play after just playing in FIBA World Cup Qualifiers for Spain this week.

Some other players to watch:

Chris Cenac Jr
Dillon Mitchell
Amari Williams
Curtis Jones
Tucker DeVries
Milos Uzan
